reason: Static schema unique-key audit reports known gaps (floor_plan_item_tags, bookmark_folders) on healthy installs.
Index table marker compliance gate exits 1 when bespoke modules are not in baseline.
Virtual/composite modules without CREATE TABLE are expected; exit 1 is informational.
Requires --endpoint=port_update|link_create|link_delete; bare audit invocation is not a regression.
Windows service-name probe fails on Laragon portable even when mysqld is running.
Delegates to test_mysql_status Laragon service-name probe on Windows.
Alert-window fixture check may exit 1 when no warranty/license rows fall in the 30-day window.
Bespoke modules (tickets, todo) intentionally differ from flattened CRUD UI contract.
